creator: crapsh@monkeybrains.net
text:
--- named.orig  Thu Jul 19 01:35:41 2007
+++ named       Thu Jul 19 01:46:44 2007
@@ -96,6 +96,15 @@
                        echo .
                fi
        fi
+       if killall -0 named 2> /dev/null; then
+               echo -n "Waiting... "
+               sleep 1
+       fi
+       if killall -0 named 2> /dev/null; then
+               if killall named 2> /dev/null; then
+                       echo -n ". "
+               fi
+       fi
 }
